acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler ecopkg SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The ecopkg sig aims to manage the software packages contributed by developers, and these packages cannot be determined which sig they belong to at the moment.. The SIG has 31 core members and maintains 87 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler ecopkg SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler ecopkg SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ecopkg@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler ecopkg SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler ecopkg SIG maintains 87 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/ecopkg.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler ecopkg SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler ecopkg SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Chen Qide, Cao Zhi, Hou Jian. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
